calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-07-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harrison Livingstone in Propria Persona. Dennis Rice for and with Nelson Wild and for Jerome Manning (Co-Trustees/Co-Eexecutors).

Mr. Livingstone stated that he was the plaintiff speaking for the family of the deceased, that he did not have consent in writing, and that the two sisters of the deceased feared the no contest clause. Mr. Rice stated that service was inappropriate because service was done by an interested party, that the allegations did not meet the requirement of the code of civil procedures, and that Mr. Livingstone had no standing. The Court denied the petition. If Mr. Livingstone is to do anything else, he must hire an attorney. Mr. rice will prepare the order.

Judge: Herbert Donaldson. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Leong.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-14-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Harrison Livingston appearing as petitioner. Dennis Rice appearing for and with Nelson Wild as trustee and named executor in the Will. Court can not make sense of the filings and denied the petition because it is improper. Court advised Mr. Livinston to get a lawyer. Mr. Livingston complained about the Will being forged and it is not the family's wish to have the trustee in charge of the estate. He asked the Court to put the administration on hold and order the trustee to do nothing more. The Court indicated that the trust is not before the court. Mr. Rice stated that he did not agree with Mr. Livingston.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Stella Obi.
